info.description: Ini adalah dokumentasi untuk Backend API Point of Sale (POS) MVP.
info.title: POS MVP API Documentation

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT token for API access
Register a new user account for the POS system

get.description: Retrieve a list of all product categories. Requires Admin or Manager role.

post.description: Create a new product category. Requires Admin or Manager role.

get.description: Retrieve a single category by its ID. Requires Admin or Manager role.

put.description: Update an existing category by its ID. Requires Admin or Manager role.

409.description: Category name conflicts with existing category

delete.description: Delete a category by its ID. Requires Admin or Manager role. Cannot delete if category is used by products.

409.description: Category is used by products and cannot be deleted

get.description: Get today's sales summary including total sales, transaction count, items sold, low stock alerts, and top-selling products. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Retrieve a paginated list of all products. Requires Admin or Manager role.

post.description: Create a new product in the inventory. Requires Admin or Manager role.

409.description: Product SKU or name already exists

get.description: Retrieve products with stock at or below the threshold. Useful for inventory alerts. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Retrieve a single product by its ID. Requires Admin or Manager role.

put.description: Update an existing product by its ID. Requires Admin or Manager role.

409.description: Product SKU or name conflicts with existing product

delete.description: Delete a product by its ID. Requires Admin or Manager role. Cannot delete if product is used in transactions.

409.description: Product is used in transactions and cannot be deleted

get.description: Get product sales performance for a date range, sorted by quantity sold. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get sales report for a date range including daily breakdown and summary. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get a paginated list of all shifts (open and closed). Requires Admin or Manager role.

post.description: Close the currently open shift with ending cash count. Calculates expected vs actual cash and difference. Requires authentication.

400.description: Invalid input or no open shift

get.description: Get the currently open shift with real-time transaction summary. Requires authentication.

post.description: Open a new cashier shift with starting cash amount. Only one shift can be open at a time. Requires authentication.

400.description: Invalid input or shift already open

get.description: Get shift details by ID including reconciliation data. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Retrieve a list of all sales transactions. Requires Admin or Manager role.

post.description: Process a new sales transaction. Automatically deducts stock, calculates totals, and generates invoice code. Accessible by all authenticated roles (Admin, Manager, Cashier).

400.description: Invalid input, insufficient stock, or insufficient payment

get.description: Retrieve a single transaction with its details. Requires Admin or Manager role.

product_name.description: Cache nama produk (jika produk diubah, histori transaksi tetap benar)

cost.description: Harus lebih besar atau sama dengan 0

data.description: Bisa berisi struct (item tunggal) atau string (token)
